chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 128 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.531/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.532/2024 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 30.01.2024 M/s Israr Ahmed Shah and Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Advocates for petitioners..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi, Law Officer of Election Commission of Pakistan, Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General and Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh, present in Court in other matters, waive notice of this petition. Syed Ahmed Fawad, Deputy Commissioner / District Returning Officer, Khairpur, Waqar Ahmed Shaikh, Mukhtiarkar / Assistant Returning Officer, Nara and Tanveer Hassan Kalwar, Assistant Commisioner / Assistant Returning Officer, Mirwah have also shown their appearance in this petition. We have heard the parties. Deputy Commissioner, present, supports the impugned order and states that in the previous polling station at GPS/GMS Sher Muhammad Panjabi, incidents of firing were reported in General Election-2018 and Local Government Election-2022, and in fact two persons were murdered. The current polling station (GHS Muhammad Shah) is located at Mehran Highway and is a secured place. Faced with this situation, learned Counsel for petitioners does not press this petition, which is accordingly disposed of in above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
